content:
# Session 44 (iter-044) ‚Äî Review

## Metadata
- Sorry count: **7 ‚Üí 7** (TensorObjInverse.lean). No sorry fully eliminated.
- Build: `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjInverse` **EXIT 0** (green-mod-sorry, 8324 jobs) ‚Äî independently re-confirmed this review (not LSP).
- Targets attempted: B1 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` (advanced), B2 `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat` (probed, blocked).
- Files edited: `TensorObjInverse.lean`, `TO_USER.md`.

## Headline ‚Äî B1 Œ¥-conjugation GENUINELY DISCHARGED; new privacy gate exposed
The iter-044 de-private of the Œ¥-conjugation lemmas (`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` et al.) **worked**:
grep-confirmed `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` is now PUBLIC (root L4678, no `private`). The prover used it
to convert B1 from a bare `sorry` (behind a no-op `haveI`) into a real ~25-line compiling proof (L280‚Äì327)
that discharges the entire Œ¥-conjugation geometric content and isolates the remainder to ONE per-leg
sheafification residual (`sorry` L328). Both reviewers confirm the body is honest (no axiom/native_decide/
fake; the `haveI` L281 is live, not dead code).

This is the first genuine *code* advance on B1 since it was stated ‚Äî but it is NOT a closure (sorry 7‚Üí7).

## Per-target detail

### B1 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` ‚Äî PARTIAL (real advance)
Proof now does (verified at L280‚Äì327):
1. `simp only [tensorObj_restrict_iso]; apply Iso.ext; simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Category.assoc]; congr 1`
   ‚Äî cancels the shared `restrictFunctorIsoPullback`-prefix.
2. `simp only [Functor.mapIso_hom, ‚Ä¶, Functor.Monoidal.ŒºIso_inv, tensorObjIsoOfIso, ‚Ä¶]` ‚Äî reads `(ŒºIso).inv = Œ¥`.
3. `rw [pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse f M.val N.val, Iso.app_inv]; erw [Iso.inv_hom_id_app_assoc]` ‚Äî **discharges
   Œ¥-conjugation**, cancels `H1.inv ‚â´ H1.hom`.
4. `erw [Functor.map_comp]; simp only [pullbackTensorMap, Category.assoc]; congr 1; congr 1` ‚Äî unfolds
   `pullbackTensorMap`, cancels the shared `sheafCompPb ; a_Y.map Œ¥` prefix.
5. Residual `sorry` (L328): `a_Y.map (H1.inv ‚äó‚Çò H1.inv) = sheafifyTensorUnitIso.hom ‚â´ a_Y.map(forget pvIso ‚äó‚Çò) ‚â´ a_Y.map(forget œÅ.inv ‚äó‚Çò)`.

**NEW BLOCKER (category 1 ‚Äî inaccessible ingredient, NOT difficulty):** collapsing the `sheafifyTensorUnitIso.hom`
factor (LHS has none, so it must be eliminated) requires root `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'`
(TensorObjSubstrate.lean L1837) + the def `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` (L1040). **Both grep-confirmed `private`**
‚áí invisible from TensorObjInverse.lean. Public `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural` (L1896) only *commutes* the
factor past a tensorHom; it cannot remove it. Exact analogue of the Œ¥-conjugation block iter-044 just resolved.

**Dead ends (recorded):** `rw [Functor.map_comp]` fails on defeq-not-syntactic sheaf carrier ‚Üí must `erw`;
plain `rw [Iso.inv_hom_id_app_assoc]` fails (`.app` args `Monoidal.tensorObj` vs `‚äó`) ‚Üí `rw [Iso.app_inv]` first.

### B2 `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat` ‚Äî BLOCKED (genuine mate calculus)
Probed: merge six `pushforward V.Œπ .map` factors via `simp only [‚Üê Functor.map_comp]` (works); tried reducing
via `Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` ‚Üí **CIRCULAR** (goal becomes the `.hom.app`-level form of B2
itself). Genuine content = pseudofunctoriality coherence of `restrictFunctorComp`/`pullbackComp` against
`leftAdjointUniq` (`mateEquiv_vcomp`/`leftAdjointUniq_trans`), ~80‚Äì120 LOC. Independent of the privacy gate ‚Äî
the one fully-unblocked sorry. Candidate for effort-breaker.

### S2 / S3 / S4a / S4b / telescope ‚Äî untouched (gated)
S2/S4b downstream of B1's residual; S3/S4a dual stretch; telescope wires all five. No work this iter (correct).

## Reviewer audits
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (tensorobjinverse044):** B1 body honest, all 7 sorries blueprint-authorized,
  **0 must-fix**. 2 major (blueprint-side): (1) B1's iter-043 `% NOTE:` now misleading (blames the resolved
  Œ¥-conjugation gate, not the live `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` gate) ‚Äî **FIXED by this review**; (2) B1 proof
  sketch under-details the per-leg residual the Lean now exposes ‚Üí blueprint-writer next iter.
  Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjinverse044.md`.
- **lean-auditor (iter044):** confirms genuine advance, no cosmetic reshuffle, no stale "root privacy"
  framing in TensorObjInverse.lean, exact sorry count 7 (none masked; L728‚Äì729 `erw` deps explicit).
  **1 must-fix (other file): `RelPicFunctor.lean:519‚Äì522` ‚Äî `PicSharp` defined as constant functor at
  `PUnit`** (wrong stub). Majors: stale "lhs_tmul still sorry" comment in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:46‚Äì47`
  (closed iter-039); stale "typed-sorry OnProduct" in `LineBundlePullback.lean:40‚Äì56`; false "5 pins
  complete" status in two files. Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter044.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, proof block of `lem:tensorobj_restrict_iso_eq_pullback_tensor_map`:
  replaced the stale iter-043 `% NOTE:` (Œ¥-conjugation-privacy, now resolved) with an iter-044 `% NOTE:`
  recording the discharge + the live `sheafifyTensorUnitIso`/`sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'` private gate.
- No `\leanok` override (B1 still carries its `sorry`; sync_leanok iter=44, added 0/removed 0 ‚Äî correct).

## Key findings / patterns
- **The B1 telescope route surfaces root-privacy gates one at a time.** iter-044 resolved the Œ¥-conjugation
  gate and immediately hit the next (`sheafifyTensorUnitIso`). Expect the same shape downstream. The cheap,
  repeatable unblock is a *batch* de-private refactor of the root sheafification/comparison internals, not
  one-at-a-time.
- Œ¥-conjugation discharge recipe (reusable): `rw [pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse ‚Ä¶, Iso.app_inv]; erw
  [Iso.inv_hom_id_app_assoc]` ‚Äî `Iso.app_inv` BEFORE the `erw` is required (defeq-not-syntactic `.app` args).
- `erw` mandatory past sheafification `.map` legs (defeq-not-syntactic carrier) ‚Äî consistent with prior iters.

## Notes (LOW)
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 104 `lean_aux` nodes (whole-project cumulative debt). No NEW unmatched decls
  this iter ‚Äî prover added 0 top-level declarations. Enumeration deferred (pre-existing, not session-introduced).
- blueprint-doctor: clean (0 structural findings).
